title: McCarthy Tétrault Wins Prestigious Catalyst Award for 2025
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Wins Prestigious Catalyst Award for 2025
McCarthy Tétrault is proud to announce that it has won the Catalyst Award for 2025 , an achievement that honours the firm’s ongoing initiatives to advance gender equity and diversity.
Catalyst presents the award each year to forward-thinking organizations that develop new and innovative ways to advance equity, diversity and inclusion. Catalyst identified the firm’s pioneering Inclusion Now strategy as one of the market differentiators in recognizing McCarthy Tétrault as the first Canadian law firm to receive this international honour.
From its inception in 2019, McCarthy Tétrault’s Inclusion Now strategy has been championed by Dave Leonard , who will be retiring as CEO on December 31 after nine years.
“By integrating gender equity analysis across our policies and talent decisions, we're creating an inclusive environment where everyone can thrive. We are honoured to receive this prestigious award from Catalyst,” Dave said.
Charlene Theodore , Chief Inclusion Officer, leads Inclusion Now, an initiative dedicated to fostering diversity and inclusion in support of the firm’s members, its clients, the legal profession, as well as the broader community.
"At McCarthy Tétrault, embracing diversity, equity, and inclusion is an important part of who we are," added Sunil Kapur, CEO-elect. “We've made strides, but there is more to do. This accolade means we're moving in the right direction, and it fuels our drive and commitment to continue to ensure everyone at our firm feels valued."
Since 1987, Catalyst has recognized 110 initiatives at 98 organizations from around the world that continue to develop new and innovative ways to advance their talent through gender equity.

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, advising on large and complex assignments for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London, UK.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information please contact: media@mccarthy.ca
- Sunil Kapur Partner | Chief Executive Officer People.Offices.Singular Toronto
